title: melica cretica subsp. monticola
intro: Melica cretica subsp. monticola, also known as mountain melic grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Melica cretica subsp. monticola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
